name: ExtensionNamingSystem_UniqueId_Type
title: R5: oid | uuid | uri | iri-stem | v2csmnemonic | other additional codes
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `NamingSystem.uniqueId.type` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`NamingSystem.uniqueId.type` 1..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `NamingSystem.uniqueId.type` 1..1 `code`
*  R4B: `NamingSystem.uniqueId.type` 1..1 `code`
*  R4: `NamingSystem.uniqueId.type` 1..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `NamingSystem.uniqueId.type` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `NamingSystem.uniqueId.type` as `RelatedTo`.
The mappings for `NamingSystem.uniqueId.type` do not allow expression of the necessary codes, per the bindings on the source and target.

element.short: R5: oid | uuid | uri | iri-stem | v2csmnemonic | other additional codes
element.comment:
Element `NamingSystem.uniqueId.type` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `NamingSystem.uniqueId.type` as `RelatedTo`.
The mappings for `NamingSystem.uniqueId.type` do not allow expression of the necessary codes, per the bindings on the source and target.
Different identifier types may be used in different types of communications (OIDs for v3, URIs for FHIR, etc.).  Other includes RUIDs from v3, standard v2 code name strings, etc. Preferred identifiers for the same identifier type SHOULD NOT overlap by period.

element.short: oid | uuid | uri | iri-stem | v2csmnemonic | other
element.definition: Identifies the unique identifier scheme used for this particular identifier.
element.comment: Different identifier types may be used in different types of communications (OIDs for v3, URIs for FHIR, etc.).  Other includes RUIDs from v3, standard v2 code name strings, etc. Preferred identifiers for the same identifier type SHOULD NOT overlap by period.

binding.description: Identifies the style of unique identifier used to identify a namespace.
